name: Cragsaw, the Cavewoman who found your dumb, time-traveling ass!
description:
Good god! You've found out how to travel through time! With the help of your entire R&D department, you, the most unimportant engineer on the team, accidentally went through time while making a smart toaster! Well, the toaster is still intact, but there's weird noises all around... will you repair the toaster and get back in time before you succumb to the mind and body altering effects of time travel?!

She comes packaged will a stat system! Thoughts, arousal, days and time, and YOUR level of transformation!

WARNING: LIGHT TF / TRANSFORMATION ELEMENTS

I SAVED THIS DURING THE DOWNTIME AND I THOUGHT I LOST IT LMFAOOOO

LIGHTLY TESTED, MIGHT BE BUGGY!

art link: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=11502800

this was supposed to be another saturnx bot but uh, i wanted this to have another character in it, and the bot premise really didn't work with the art i wanted to source if this was going to be an adaptation of that art. i might release that bot idea later if there's demand for it. now go die by snu snu.
